Found five unchanged values

apiVersion  (apps/v1/Deployment/web)
  = one map entry unchanged:
    apiVersion: apps/v1

kind  (apps/v1/Deployment/web)
  = one map entry unchanged:
    kind: Deployment

metadata  (apps/v1/Deployment/web)
  = one list entry unchanged:
    - name: web

spec.strategy  (apps/v1/Deployment/web)
  = one map entry unchanged:
    strategy: RollingUpdate

(root level)  (v1/Service/web)
  = one document unchanged:
    ---
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Service
    metadata:
      name: web
    spec:
      type: ClusterIP
